headline: Google rebrand NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook amid capability delays
body: Google rebranded NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook while simultaneously delaying Gemini 3.5 Pro due to performance gaps in coding tasks. The vendor landscape shift signals Google recalibrating its AI product strategy across enterprise applications. For healthcare AI consultants, this matters because notebook-style AI interfaces are gaining adoption in clinical documentation and research workflows, and vendor stability around core model capabilities directly impacts deployment confidence. Healthcare organizations evaluating Gemini-based tools should monitor whether these delays affect roadmap commitments for EHR integration or clinical AI features. The coding performance gaps also raise questions about the reliability of AI-assisted clinical decision support systems built on delayed model versions.
